The DoD-0 persistence gate proved load-bearing: this iteration's dev/review/qa/audit each ran it AND the evaluator independently re-verified it against the live tree (7 files +1123/-9, all four required paths, history_planner.py present, status.json populated, handoff==diff). This gate MUST be re-applied for J-16 (which adds new FE code).
